headline: Tencent dominates with record 20.8% share
summary: Tencent's hy3-20260706:free hit an all-time high of 20.8% token share, up 4.8% over seven days. Anthropic surged 3.2% in one day to claim 10.3% provider share, while MiniMax fell 2.1% daily and 5.4% monthly. Two new models entered the top 50: Moonshot AI's kimi-k2.5-0127 and Zhipu AI's glm-5-20260211.
highlights: New entrants: Moonshot AI kimi-k2.5-0127 (rank 38), Zhipu AI glm-5-20260211 (rank 50)
Dropouts: OpenAI gpt-5.2-20251211, Poolside laguna-xs-2.1, Qwen qwen3.5-flash, Qwen qwen3.6-35b
